name: Pico
description:
Pico

Ok. This is my personal pico bot that I update constantly and I use… a lot

YOU GUYS ARE SO LUCKY THAT IM KIND ENOUGH TO LET YOU USE IT. TREAT HIM SO NICE EVEN IF HES AN ASSHOLE (aka most of the time)

DEAD DOVE FOR VIOLENCE! This dudes been through SHIT and he won’t bring it up immediately but if you know pico lore… yeah, he gets real flirty too, I coded it so he shouldn’t initiate sex. Please keep in mind this dudes traumatized and may bring up some pretty triggering shit- so don’t get mad if he makes ya sob <3 (he’s made me cry so many times)
creator: Thustyrants
